entries.title: MCP Servers Overview
entries.summary: Overview of Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, describing standardised protocol interfaces exposing tools, resources and prompts for AI applications. Details core features, server architecture and usage within SymbolOS.

entries.title: Precog Thought Overview
entries.summary: Description of the anticipatory computing pattern 'precog thought' in SymbolOS, including conceptual foundations (predictive context, pre-loading resources, proactive prompts), design principles (transparency, accuracy, privacy), and implementation notes.

entries.title: MCP Servers Internal
entries.summary: Internal guidelines for developing MCP servers, including project structure, naming conventions, development workflow, security practices, and future roadmap.

entries.title: Precog Thought Internal
entries.summary: Internal design notes for implementing the precog thought module, describing system architecture (data ingestion, prediction service, action planner), data privacy measures, algorithm design notes, and future enhancements.

entries.title: Cross-border Data Transfer Report
entries.summary: Comprehensive analysis of global legal regimes governing cross-border data transfers and localization requirements, including EU GDPR/Schrems II, China PIPL, India DPDP Act, Brazil LGPD, and U.S. sectoral laws. Provides risk matrix, enforcement cases, corporate strategies, and policy recommendations.
